case_title: WALTER RODAS VS. JOSE BUNAVENTURA VINALS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODAS, WALTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VINALS, JOSE BUNAVENTURA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PRO LINE PAINTING CO $6,020.00 PRINCIPAL, $207.81 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,407.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF RODAS, WALTER

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ASSIGNEE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODAS, WALTER AS TO DEFENDANT VINALS, JOSE BUNAVENTURA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PRO LINE PAINTING CO
